title: PublicArtwork
description: A completed Percent for Art commission — a permanent public artwork funded under NYC's Percent for Art law (1% of eligible City capital construction budgets goes to public art). Canonical schema reconciling 'Completed Percent for Art projects with artist information' (gzdv-qiga, 7 columns). Keyed on Percent Project.

percentProject.description: Percent for Art project name / title ('Percent Project').

sponsorAgency.description: City agency sponsoring the capital project ('Sponsor Agency').
